8:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Purging and embargo"}],": Prevent information leakage by removing overlapping periods"]}]

1f:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Conclusion"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Quantitative trading with ML is hard. The easy alpha has been arbitraged away. Success requires:"}]
